allow: Bash(for f in amenajari-gradini.html consultanta-proiectare.html gazon-rulou.html intretinere-gradini.html lucrari-sezon.html sisteme-irigatii.html)

Bash(cd '/d/Claude code/ModernGreenGarden' && REQUIRED_FILES="index.html contact.html despre-noi.html servicii.html sisteme-irigatii.html gazon-rulou.html amenajari-gradini.html intretinere-gradini.html consultanta-proiectare.html lucrari-sezon.html politica-de-confidentialitate.html politica-de-cookies.html 404.html" && echo "=== Files MISSING <title> tag ===" && for file in $REQUIRED_FILES; do grep -q "<title>" "$file" || echo "$file"; done)

Bash(cd '/d/Claude code/ModernGreenGarden' && REQUIRED_FILES="index.html contact.html despre-noi.html servicii.html sisteme-irigatii.html gazon-rulou.html amenajari-gradini.html intretinere-gradini.html consultanta-proiectare.html lucrari-sezon.html politica-de-confidentialitate.html politica-de-cookies.html 404.html" && echo "=== Files MISSING meta description ===" && for file in $REQUIRED_FILES; do grep -q '<meta name="description"' "$file" || echo "$file"; done)
